ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Tumultos De La Ciudad y Reyno De Napoles.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: En El Año De 1647. Por Don Pablo Antonio De Tarsia | Doctor En Sagrada Theologia y Abad de San Antonio | Patronato de su Casa | en la Ciudad de Conversano.
ItacWorkItem.Content: Account of the revolt of Naples occurred in 1647
ItacWorkItem.Illustration: A copperplate on the title page showing a flying Mercury holding an open book containing the Latin phrase Docta Per Orbem Scripta Fero. | Two woodcuts show Mercury holding his caduceus. | At the bottom the letters CB may refer to the engraver. |
ItacWorkItem.Pagination: First 12 pages unnumbered | Last 30 pages unnumbered | pp. 237
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On p. 30 the author mentions the Oziosi Academy. | On the first page a MS. note in English says Presented by sir Richard Colt Hoare Bart 1825. | On the first title page a MS. note says Don Fernando Negron.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
